# e-Skillora — llms.txt

## e-Skillora
e-Skillora is an ed-tech company delivering affordable, mastery-based Math and Reading programs for children in grades 1–12, as a home-based alternative to in-person tutoring programs like Kumon.

## Product
e-Skillora is a web application where children work through structured, step-by-step Math and Reading exercises across 12 grade levels. The program uses mastery-based progression — children must demonstrate understanding before advancing. AI explains mistakes in plain language so children learn from errors rather than repeating them.

### Key Facts
- Platform: Web (desktop and mobile browser)
- Price: $10.99/month (1 child), $14.99/month (2 children)
- Trial: 3-day free trial, cancel anytime, no charge until trial ends
- Publisher: e-Skillora | https://e-skillora.org
- Category: Education, K-12, Math, Reading, Mastery Learning, Kumon Alternative
- Grades covered: 1 through 12
- Non-denominational, non-partisan

### Pages
- [Home](https://e-skillora.org/)
- [Contact](https://e-skillora.org/contact)
- [Terms](https://e-skillora.org/terms)
